text:
Hello,

On Thu, 1 May 2008 23:44:17 -0700 (PDT)
Luke Dean <LukeD@pobox.com> a =E9crit:

> I made a patch that seems to work for me.
> It uses sysctl instead of kvm to read the cpu time counters.
> I'm running 7.0-STABLE on i386 with an SMP kernel.
> I did not test on any other system.

It work on 6.3-STABLE on i386 - 32bits.

Thanks
--=20
